compiled_state.title: Bug tickets created as task type instead of bug type — investigate sub-agent and blackboard dispatch instructions
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Multiple tickets that should be type 'bug' are being created as type 'task' (e.g., cee8-6e51). This causes them to appear as orphaned tasks without epic parents rather than standalone bugs. Suspected root cause: instructions in skills, prompts, or workflows (possibly sub-agent dispatch or blackboard functionality) are directing agents to use 'ticket create task' instead of 'ticket create bug' when filing bugs. Needs investigation across skill files, sub-agent prompt templates, and blackboard write patterns.
